sql.where:
AND e1.drawCode IS NULL AND e1.empId IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ep2.empId FROM empProject ep1 JOIN empProject ep2 ON ep1.projectId = ep2.projectId WHERE ep1.empId = #{sessionEmpId} UNION SELECT #{sessionEmpId} FROM DUAL )
AND e1.empId LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND e2.name LIKE '%' || #{empName} || '%'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM commoncode cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'DEPT' AND cc.code = e2.deptCode AND cc.codeName LIKE '%' || #{deptName} || '%' )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM commoncode cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'RANK' AND cc.code = e2.gradeCode AND cc.codeName LIKE '%' || #{gradeName} || '%' )
AND e1.empStatusCode = #{empStatus}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM empProject ep WHERE ep.empId = e1.empId AND ep.projectId = #{projectId} )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee1 e1 JOIN employee2 e2 ON e1.empId = e2.empId

SELECT e1.empId, e2.name AS empName, e2.deptCode, e2.gradeCode, e1.empStatusCode, ( SELECT cc.codeName FROM commoncode cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'DEPT' AND cc.code = e2.deptCode ) AS deptName, ( SELECT cc.codeName FROM commoncode cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'RANK' AND cc.code = e2.gradeCode ) AS gradeName, ( SELECT cc.codeName FROM commoncode cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'EMPSTATUS' AND cc.code = e1.empStatusCode ) AS empStatusName, ( SELECT LISTAGG(pj.title, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pj.title) FROM empProject ep JOIN project pj ON ep.projectId = pj.projectId WHERE ep.empId = e1.empId ) AS projectNames FROM employee1 e1 JOIN employee2 e2 ON e1.empId = e2.empId
ORDER BY e1.empId ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT cc.code AS "code", cc.codeName AS "codeName" FROM commoncode cc WHERE cc.codeGroup = 'EMPSTATUS' ORDER BY cc.code ASC

SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(pj.projectId) AS "projectId", pj.title AS "projectName" FROM empProject ep JOIN project pj ON TO_CHAR(ep.projectId) = TO_CHAR(pj.projectId) WHERE ep.empId = #{empId} ORDER BY pj.title
SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM period_start) AS evalYear FROM report WHERE empId = #{empId} AND depth = 0 AND period_start IS NOT NULL ORDER BY evalYear DESC

SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM r.period_start) AS reportMonth, CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(r.period_start, 'DD')) <= 7 THEN 1 WHEN TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(r.period_start, 'DD')) <= 14 THEN 2 WHEN TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(r.period_start, 'DD')) <= 21 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS reportWeek, NVL( ( SELECT MAX(fb.evaluation) FROM report fb WHERE fb.parent = r.filenum AND fb.depth = 1 AND fb.evaluation IS NOT NULL ), 'NONE' ) AS evaluation FROM report r WHERE r.empId = #{empId} AND r.depth = 0 AND r.period_start IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM r.period_start) = #{year} ORDER BY reportMonth, reportWeek
